  "communicative_function": "self-description of a metacognitive practice",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "a distinction exists between occurrent thoughts and endorsed thoughts",
    "this distinction is learnable through practice",
    "the speaker is currently engaged in cultivating that distinction"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent; presupposes a standard philosophy-of-mind or CBT-style separation between automatic cognition and reflective endorsement",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "speaker is genuinely attempting to monitor endorsement; listener shares the relevant conceptual framework; context rewards accurate self-report of mental processes",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "speaker uses the claim to disclaim responsibility for thoughts they in fact endorse or act on; distinction is invoked rhetorically rather than applied consistently"
}
